description: Triggered when facing 2+ independent tasks or failures that can be investigated or fixed concurrently without shared state or sequential dependencies.
should_trigger: We have 5 test files failing with different errors — how do I fix them all faster?
Multiple subsystems are broken: the API is down, the database is slow, and the frontend has errors
I need to fix 3 independent bugs in different parts of the codebase simultaneously
How do I parallelize work across multiple independent agent tasks?
We have failures in auth tests, payment tests, and notification tests — all unrelated
Dispatch agents to investigate these 4 independent issues in parallel
should_not_trigger: Fix this single bug in my authentication flow
Help me debug why my form submission is failing
Refactor this React component to use hooks
Write a test for this API endpoint
